title: Satellite-Constrained Return-Period Migration of Flood Hazard at Bahadurabad (Brahmaputra/Jamuna) under CMIP6 Climate Scenarios
description: Undergraduate thesis (30-day sprint, v1-LOCKED-edit-1) linking satellite-derived historical flood evidence (Sentinel-1 SAR via Mullissa 2021 ARD pipeline + Landsat MNDWI), station-based multi-distribution flood-frequency analysis at BWDB SW46.9L Bahadurabad Transit, and CMIP6-driven future flood projections under SSP2-4.5 and SSP5-8.5 by 2041-2070, with four-source uncertainty attribution (GCM x distribution x bias-correction methodology x satellite classification) via a 54-cell deterministic ensemble with parametric within-cell bootstrap (B=200, 10,800 total realisations).
